lines.speaker: Bedabin Nomad
lines.text: Hello Effendi! How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Bedabin Nomad
lines.text: This is the camp of the Bedabin. Talk to our leader, Al Shabim, he'll be happy to chat. We can sell you very reasonably priced water...

lines.speaker: Bedabin Nomad
lines.text: It is North East of here effendi, across the trackless desert. It will be a thirsty trip, can I interest you in a drink?
